subject: Klang, a mid-stage gear Pokemon consisting of two interlocked gear wheels, floating in an industrial or mechanical setting
description: Two interlocked toothed gear wheels — one large and one smaller — are depicted floating against a blurred industrial background. The larger gear has a face-like appearance with circular elements at its center, while the smaller gear orbits it. The background suggests a mechanical environment with dark metal structural elements, possibly a factory or industrial space. The gears are rendered in cool grey and silver tones with sharp detail on the teeth. The overall image conveys a sense of mechanical precision and rotation.
foreground: two interlocked toothed gear wheels floating with face-like center on the larger gear
background: dark industrial space with blurred metal structural elements
